sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n10460" key="a)ntirrhtoreu/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀντιρρητορεύω</orth>, <sense id="n10460.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">speak against, dispute with,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">τινί</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Max.</author> </bibl> </cit> Tyr.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1487.tlg001:9:3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.3</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
